---
title: "Contact and Socials"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css">
---

<div style="max-width: 600px; margin: 40px auto;">

Let's connect.

<br>

<p><i class="fa-solid fa-envelope" style="width:20px;"></i> &nbsp; [sri.vatsan0307@gmail.com](mailto:sri.vatsan0307@gmail.com)</p>

<p><i class="fa-brands fa-linkedin" style="width:20px;"></i> &nbsp; [linkedin.com/in/vatsan-balaji](https://linkedin.com/in/vatsan-balaji)</p>

<p><i class="fa-brands fa-google-scholar" style="width:20px;"></i> &nbsp; [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=cg4uo2cAAAAJ&hl=en)</p>

<p><i class="fa-brands fa-github" style="width:20px;"></i> &nbsp; [github.com/vatsan-b](https://github.com/vatsan-b)</p>

<p><i class="fa-brands fa-unsplash" style="width:20px;"></i> &nbsp; [Unsplash @Srivatsan](https://unsplash.com/@srivatsan)</p>

</div>
